name: Butler Reminders
description: Set plain-language reminders that fire a PC toast and/or a WhatsApp message when due.

pcNotify.description: Raise a native Windows toast when a reminder fires. Default true.

pushNotify.description: Send a phone push notification when a reminder fires (requires fcm). Default true when fcm is configured.

fcm.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging config for phone push. Reuses the same project + service account as butler-approvals.

serviceAccountPath.description: Path to the Firebase service-account JSON key.

whatsappNotify.description: Also send a WhatsApp message when a reminder fires (requires whatsappTarget). Default false (opt-in; the app-first path uses push).

whatsappTarget.description: WhatsApp recipient (e.g. +15551234567) for reminder messages. No target = WhatsApp disabled.
